title: Brevo vs Drip (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Brevo and Drip email marketing tools. See pricing, features, and which is best for your business.
intro: Brevo and Drip are two popular email marketing platforms with different strengths and target audiences. Brevo excels as an affordable, all-in-one CRM suite with a generous free tier, while Drip specializes in e-commerce automation with deep store integration. Your choice depends on whether you prioritize cost-effectiveness and multi-channel capabilities or advanced e-commerce tracking and revenue attribution.

comparison_table.tool_a: Freemium (Free up to 100k contacts, paid from $25/mo)
comparison_table.tool_b: Paid only (Starting at $39/mo, no free tier)
E-commerce businesses with advanced tracking needs

comparison_table.tool_a: SMS, WhatsApp, live chat, CRM, transactional API, free tier
comparison_table.tool_b: Revenue attribution, e-commerce tracking, visual automation, onsite campaigns

choose_a_if: You need a free or low-cost email marketing solution with multi-channel capabilities (SMS, WhatsApp, live chat)
You want an all-in-one CRM suite rather than a specialized e-commerce tool
You're a small business or startup with limited budget and need to scale gradually
choose_b_if: You run an e-commerce store and need advanced revenue attribution and product tracking
You want visual workflow automation and onsite campaign capabilities
Your primary focus is email marketing ROI tied to actual sales performance

faq.a: It depends on your needs. Brevo is better for cost-conscious businesses needing multi-channel marketing, while Drip excels for e-commerce stores requiring advanced sales tracking. Brevo rates slightly higher on Trustpilot (4.3 vs 3.5) and offers a free tier, making it more accessible to startups.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Brevo or Drip?
faq.a: Brevo is significantly cheaper, with a free tier supporting up to 100,000 contacts and paid plans starting at $25/month. Drip has no free option and starts at $39/month. For small businesses, Brevo can be used completely free indefinitely.

faq.q: Can I switch from Drip to Brevo?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms support contact list imports via CSV or API connections. The migration process typically involves exporting your contacts and automation workflows from Drip and rebuilding automations in Brevo. Most data transfers smoothly, though workflow logic may need adjustment due to interface differences.
